info.name: Employee Skill Matcher & Training Hub - Complete A-Z Project Flow
info.description: A-Z flow: Health -> HRD Register/Login -> CRUD Skill -> CRUD Modul -> Register 10 Karyawan -> Approval HR -> Login Karyawan -> User features -> Training logs -> AI Recommendation -> Auth extras. Jalankan berurutan.
